assertions.description: navigator.gpu is exposed for WebGPU texture creation.
navigator.gpu.requestAdapter is callable before creating a device.
GPUTexture.prototype.createView is the call site that accepts the new usage option.
GPUTextureUsage exposes TEXTURE_BINDING and STORAGE_BINDING flags for view usage subsets.
GPUTexture.createView accepts a usage subset for a texture created with multiple usage flags.
assertions.test: (async()=>{if(!navigator.gpu)return false;const a=await navigator.gpu.requestAdapter();if(!a)return false;const d=await a.requestDevice();const t=d.createTexture({size:[4,4],format:'rgba8unorm',usage:GPUTextureUsage.TEXTURE_BINDING|GPUTextureUsage.COPY_DST});const v=t.createView({usage:GPUTextureUsage.TEXTURE_BINDING});const ok=!!v;t.destroy();d.destroy();return ok;})()

assertions.description: GPUTexture.createView without usage still works, preserving the legacy view creation path.
assertions.test: (async()=>{if(!navigator.gpu)return false;const a=await navigator.gpu.requestAdapter();if(!a)return false;const d=await a.requestDevice();const t=d.createTexture({size:[4,4],format:'rgba8unorm',usage:GPUTextureUsage.TEXTURE_BINDING});const v=t.createView();const ok=!!v;t.destroy();d.destroy();return ok;})()
